textSpans.text: Procedure Description: Right total shoulder arthroplasty
23430: tenodesis of long tendon of biceps
23472: arthroplasty, glenohumeral joint; total shoulder (glenoid and proximal humeral replacement (eg, total shoulder))
23333: removal of foreign body, shoulder; deep (subfascial or intramuscular)
Ancef - 1 gram TXA at incision and another gram during closure
HPI: This is a 74 year old male who:
is being seen for a chief complaint of Right shoulder.
He did not complete his CT scan.
He is scheduled for a right total
Right upper extremity exam notable for the
with range of motion. 4 out of 5 rotator cuff
Patient Specific Notes: Ed presents today for preoperative visit.
He is scheduled for a right
We will use his regular anti-coagulants for post op DVT prophylaxis.
Please refer to the education handout for detailed counseling.
The right shoulder was braced with a ultrasling, Shoulder orthosis, abduction.
I recommend continued use of the orthosis until next follow up.
Follow up for: Further Evaluation and Management - 5 minutes.
I was present for all key aspects of the visit.
Shoulder Arthritis, Right: located on the right shoulder.
5670 W Flamingo Rd, Ste D, Las Vegas NV 89103
Primary Needs for Home Health (check all that apply):
When we call, we will also need to obtain the following information before seeing the
If you have these available, feel free to fax along with this form.
Recent H&P or recent progress notes

Electronically Signed By: Rhianna I McGowan, PA-C, 03/20/2026 06:49 AM PDT

chartSnapshot.primary_reason_for_home_health_medical_n: Edward Clyde Johnson, a 74-year-old male with a complex medical history, is being referred for home health care following a recent hospitalization and surgery for a right reverse total shoulder arthroplasty (TSA). His diagnosis includes severe osteoarthritis of the right shoulder, along with hypertension, diabetes, dyslipidemia, coronary artery disease with prior percutaneous coronary intervention and stenting, and hypothyroidism. The elective procedure was performed due to longstanding shoulder pain and functional
chartSnapshot.pain_assessment_narrative: Generalized pain with a scale 5/10; Comfort measures and pain medication were provided. Re-checked after 30 minutes, resulting with good relief.
